name: Giant Spider Guardian
description: A horse-sized arachnid with glistening black chitin and legs thick as tree branches. These elite hunters serve as the Queen's personal guards, resting in the Sentinel Chamber between patrols and striking with terrifying coordination when threats arise.
motives: Protect the Queen, ambush from above, overwhelm prey, guard silk fortress

features.name: Frenzy Strike
features.description: When spotlighted, make the Guardian's standard attack against all targets within range.

features.name: Web Anchor
features.description: Make an attack against a target within Close range. On a success, deal 2d8 physical damage and the target becomes Restrained in silk cables until they break free with a successful Strength or Agility Roll.

features.name: Ceiling Ambush
features.description: When the Guardian drops from above onto a target (from ceiling or higher position), they deal an additional 1d8 physical damage and the target becomes Vulnerable until the end of their next turn as they're knocked off balance by the impact.

features.name: Momentum
features.description: When the Guardian makes a successful attack against a PC, you gain a Fear.

lore: These are the Queen's chosen elite—survivors of countless hunts who've proven their worth through cunning and lethality. They rest suspended in the Sentinel Chamber's silk hammocks, always ready to defend their monarch's domain.
